name: CytoDyn Inc.
description: CytoDyn Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on the development and commercialization of leronlimab, a novel humanized monoclonal antibody targeting the CCR5 receptor. Leronlimab is being studied for multiple therapeutic indications, including human immunodeficiency virus (HIV), various oncology applications, and non-alcoholic steatohepatitis (NASH). The company is dedicated to advancing this versatile platform molecule to address significant unmet medical needs across diverse therapeutic areas.
